PlayerSeason.description: This field is expected to be NULL

LatestNews.description: The latest news associated with this player

PlayerID.description: The unique PlayerID of the player as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career.

Team.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the team that the player is on. Note: If this player is a free agent; this field is NULL.

Position.description: The primary position of the player. Possible Values: C; CB; DB; DE; DL; DT; FB; FS; G; ILB; K; KR; LB; LS; NT; OL; OLB; OT; P; QB; RB; S; SS; T; TE; WR.

Status.description: The player's current status.  Possible values include Active, Inactive, Injured Reserve, Physically Unable to Perform, Practice Squad, Suspended, Non Football Injury, Non-Football Illness, Commissioner Exempt List, Exempt/Left Team, Paternity, Bereavement, Reserve/COVID-19, and Voluntary Opt Out. Inactive indicates that this player is a free agent.  Active indicates that this player is on his team's active roster.

College.description: College team the player played for prior to turning professional

Experience.description: Number of years experience.  Note: This number is incremented every year; in the Spring; when we load the rookies following the NFL Draft. Rookies will have Experience = 0; while second year players will have Experience = 2.

FantasyPosition.description: The player's fantasy football position. Possible values: QB; RB; WR; TE; DL; LB; DB; K; P; OL.

Active.description: Whether or not the player is on the active roster of the NFL team (True/False)

PositionCategory.description: The category of the player's position (OFF; DEF; ST)

ExperienceString.description: The player's experience converted to a string

BirthDateString.description: The player's date of birth converted to a string

PhotoUrl.description: This field is deprecated. Note: Headshots are now delivered through IMAGN. Please see our Headshots products for further information.

ByeWeek.description: The week the player is on bye for the upcoming or current season

UpcomingGameOpponent.description: The opposing team the player is playing against in the upcoming week

UpcomingGameWeek.description: The week of the player's upcoming game (this will be the upcoming week unless the player is on Bye that week, which would bump it to the next week)

ShortName.description: The first initial and last name of the player (J. Doe)

AverageDraftPosition.description: The average draft position of the player in re-draft leagues

DepthPositionCategory.description: The category (Offense, Defense or Special Teams) of the players DepthPositionCategory (OFF, DEF, ST)

DepthPosition.description: The position this player is listed at on his team's depth chart (e.g. QB; LWR; RDE; LILB, K)

DepthOrder.description: The order this player is at his position (1 = Starter; 2 = Backup; 3 = 3rd String; 4 = 4th String; 5 = 5th String)

DepthDisplayOrder.description: The display order of the positions (for display purposes)

CurrentTeam.description: The team who currently employs this player. This value is null when this player is unemployed (for example a free agent or retired player).

CollegeDraftTeam.description: The team who drafted this player. Note: If this player was an Undrafted Free Agent; then it's the team who first signed him as a rookie.

CollegeDraftYear.description: The year this player entered the NFL as a rookie

CollegeDraftRound.description: The round this player was drafted in

CollegeDraftPick.description: The overall pick in the draft this player was selected

IsUndraftedFreeAgent.description: Whether this player was an undrafted free agent. This value is True if the player was not drafted.

HeightFeet.description: The feet component of a player's height (if player is 6'3", then this value would be 6)

HeightInches.description: The inches component of a player's height (if player is 6'3", then this value would be 3)

UpcomingOpponentRank.description: The player's upcoming opponent's rank in fantasy points allowed

UpcomingOpponentPositionRank.description: The player's upcoming opponent's rank in fantasy points allowed to his fantasy position

CurrentStatus.description: The player's current status.  Possible values include Active, Inactive, Injured Reserve, Physically Unable to Perform, Practice Squad, Suspended, Non Football Injury, Non-Football Illness, Commissioner Exempt List, Exempt/Left Team, Paternity, Bereavement, Reserve/COVID-19, and Voluntary Opt Out. Inactive indicates that this player is a free agent.  Active indicates that this player is on his team's active roster.  Can also include injury status.

UpcomingSalary.description: The player's salary for the upcoming week in accordance with a $50,000 salary cap. This is used for daily fantasy sports salary cap contests. Salaries represent those published by DraftKings. When DraftKings doesn't publish a salary for a given game; the most recent DraftKings salary is used. We recommend using our new DFS endpoints instead.

FantasyAlarmPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to the FantasyAlarm news feed

SportRadarPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to the SportRadar API

RotoworldPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to the Rotoworld news feed

RotoWirePlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to the RotoWire news feed

StatsPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to the STATS data feeds

SportsDirectPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to the SportsDirect data feeds, now part of Nielsen GraceNote

XmlTeamPlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID for cross reference use with XML Team data feeds

FanDuelPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to FanDuel

DraftKingsPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to DraftKings

YahooPlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID for cross reference use with Yahoo

InjuryStatus.description: The player's current injury status, in the form of likelihood that player plays (Probable, Questionable, Doubtful, Out)

InjuryBodyPart.description: The body part that is injured for the player (Knee; Groin; Calf; Hamstring; etc.)

InjuryStartDate.description: The day that the player's injury started or was first discovered

InjuryNotes.description: A brief description of the player's injury and expected availability

FanDuelName.description: The player's full name in FanDuel's daily fantasy sports platform

DraftKingsName.description: The player's full name in DraftKings' daily fantasy sports platform

YahooName.description: The player's name in Yahoo's daily fantasy sports platform

FantasyPositionDepthOrder.description: The order this player is at his team's FantasyPosition

DeclaredInactive.description: Whether the player has been declared inactive. This value is updated in the hours leading up to game start time; as teams announce their inactive players.  Note: This is only updated for offensive skill position players (QB; RB; WR; TE).

UpcomingFanDuelSalary.description: The player's FanDuel salary for the upcoming week. Note: We recommend using our new DFS endpoints instead.

UpcomingDraftKingsSalary.description: The player's DraftKings salary for the upcoming week. Note: We recommend using our new DFS endpoints instead.

UpcomingYahooSalary.description: The player's Yahoo salary for the upcoming week. We recommend using our new DFS endpoints instead.

TeamID.description: The unique ID of the team that the player is on. Note: If the player is a free agent; this field is NULL

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

FantasyDraftPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to FantasyDraft

FantasyDraftName.description: The player's full name in FantasyDraft's daily fantasy sports platform

UsaTodayPlayerID.description: The player's cross reference PlayerID to USA Today headshot data feeds

UsaTodayHeadshotUrl.description: The player's headshot URL as provided by USA Today. License from USA Today is required.

UsaTodayHeadshotNoBackgroundUrl.description: The player's transparent background headshot URL as provided by USA Today. License from USA Today is required.

UsaTodayHeadshotUpdated.description: The last updated date of the player's headshot as provided by USA Today. License from USA Today is required.

UsaTodayHeadshotNoBackgroundUpdated.description: The last updated date of the player's transparent background headshot as provided by USA Today. License from USA Today is required.
